hero.title: Regenerative Root Therapy
hero.subtitle: Healing from within. Restoring what was lost.

inserts.title: Welcome to the Future of Endodontics
inserts.content: Regenerative Root Procedures use advanced biological approaches to promote natural root development and tissue healing, especially in immature or previously infected teeth.
bullets: Revives the tooth's natural healing potential
Essential for young patients needing root growth

inserts.title: What Is Regenerative Endodontic Therapy?
inserts.content: A biologically based treatment leveraging advancements in pulp biology and stem cell science to achieve what was once considered impossible: helping teeth heal themselves.

inserts.title: Why Traditional Methods Fall Short
inserts.content: Conventional approaches in underdeveloped teeth often compromise long-term dental health:
bullets: Loss of tooth vitality and strength
